name: io.github.davidlandais/ovh-api-mcp
description: MCP server for the OVH API — explore and execute any OVH endpoint from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible LLM client. Sandboxed JavaScript execution with OpenAPI spec validation. Built in Rust.

environment_variables.name: OVH_APPLICATION_KEY
environment_variables.description: OVH API application key (create at https://eu.api.ovh.com/createApp/)

environment_variables.name: OVH_ENDPOINT
environment_variables.description: OVH API region: eu, ca, or us

environment_variables.name: OVH_SERVICES
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated list of OVH API services to load, or '*' for all
